form:Form.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTRUCTURA.form

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_var_group, T.c_var_group, T.d_var_group, T.c_mode from WRK01_GROUPS as T where T.oi_wf={$PARAM/@oi_wf}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_var, T.c_var, T.d_var, T.e_order, T.c_type from WRK01_VARS as T where T.oi_var_group={$PARAM/@oi_var_group} order by e_order asc')/ROWS/ROW
